concepts.name: Tree
concepts.short_definition: A hierarchical data structure consisting of nodes connected by edges.

concepts.name: Node
concepts.short_definition: A fundamental unit of a tree, containing data and references to children.

concepts.name: Root Node
concepts.short_definition: The topmost node in a tree, with no parent.

concepts.name: Child Node
concepts.short_definition: A node directly connected to another node (its parent) further up the tree.

concepts.name: Parent Node
concepts.short_definition: A node directly connected to another node (its child) further down the tree.

concepts.name: Binary Tree
concepts.short_definition: A tree where each node has at most two children, referred to as the left child and the right child.

concepts.name: Binary Search Tree
concepts.short_definition: A binary tree where for each node, all values in the left subtree are less than the node's value, and all values in the right subtree are greater.

concepts.name: Level
concepts.short_definition: The distance of a node from the root node, with the root at level 0.

concepts.name: Breadth-First Search
concepts.short_definition: A graph traversal algorithm that explores all the neighbor nodes at the present depth prior to moving on to nodes at the next depth level.

concepts.name: Graph Traversal
concepts.short_definition: The process of visiting each node in a graph exactly once.

concepts.name: Graph
concepts.short_definition: A collection of nodes (vertices) connected by edges.

concepts.name: Queue
concepts.short_definition: A linear data structure that follows the First-In, First-Out (FIFO) principle.

concepts.name: Enqueue
concepts.short_definition: The operation of adding an element to the rear of a queue.

concepts.name: Dequeue
concepts.short_definition: The operation of removing an element from the front of a queue.

concepts.name: Peek
concepts.short_definition: The operation of viewing the element at the front of a queue without removing it.

concepts.name: Empty Queue
concepts.short_definition: Checking if a queue contains any elements.

concepts.name: Level Order Traversal
concepts.short_definition: Traversing a tree by visiting nodes level by level, from left to right within each level.

concepts.name: Tree Traversal
concepts.short_definition: The process of visiting each node in a tree exactly once.

concepts.name: Algorithm
concepts.short_definition: A step-by-step procedure for solving a problem or accomplishing a task.

concepts.name: Data Structure
concepts.short_definition: A particular way of organizing and storing data in a computer so that it can be accessed and modified efficiently.

concepts.name: Iterative Algorithm
concepts.short_definition: An algorithm that uses loops to repeat a set of instructions.

concepts.name: Tree Structure
concepts.short_definition: The arrangement of nodes and edges that define a tree.

concepts.name: Left Child
concepts.short_definition: The child node on the left side of a parent node.

concepts.name: Right Child
concepts.short_definition: The child node on the right side of a parent node.

concepts.name: Tree Node Value
concepts.short_definition: The data stored within a node of a tree.

concepts.name: Tree Traversal Order
concepts.short_definition: The specific sequence in which nodes are visited during a traversal.

concepts.name: Tree Representation
concepts.short_definition: How a tree is represented in memory, typically using nodes and pointers.

concepts.name: Tree Application
concepts.short_definition: Real-world scenarios where trees are used as data structures.

concepts.name: Tree Properties
concepts.short_definition: Key attributes and rules that define a tree structure.

concepts.name: Tree Height
concepts.short_definition: The length of the longest path from the root to a leaf node.

concepts.name: Leaf Node
concepts.short_definition: A node in a tree that has no children.

concepts.name: Tree Size
concepts.short_definition: The total count of nodes in a tree.

concepts.name: Tree Node Pointer
concepts.short_definition: A reference or pointer from one node to another, representing an edge.

concepts.name: Tree Traversal Algorithm
concepts.short_definition: A specific algorithm designed to visit all nodes in a tree.

concepts.name: Tree Level Identification
concepts.short_definition: The process of determining the level of each node in a tree.

concepts.name: Tree Node Comparison
concepts.short_definition: Comparing the values of two nodes, often used in search operations.

concepts.name: Tree Structure Analysis
concepts.short_definition: Examining the arrangement and balance of nodes in a tree.

concepts.name: Tree Data Storage
concepts.short_definition: How data is organized and managed within a tree structure.

concepts.name: Tree Node Access
concepts.short_definition: The process of accessing or retrieving specific nodes within a tree.
